jh.name: Junior High: Foundations
jh.desc: Solidify the logical thinking and spatial grasp required for High School math.

hs_1a.name: High School: Math I・A
hs_1a.desc: Basic tools directly connected to modern data science and design.

hs_2b.name: High School: Math II・B
hs_2b.desc: Advanced analysis tools for handling phenomenon transitions and energy accumulation.

hs_3c.name: High School: Math III・C
hs_3c.desc: The ultimate OS for manipulating space, dimensions, and limits to approach universal truths.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.wipe_desc: Delete all learning progress, XP, and rank. This action cannot be undone.

mastery.title: Mastery
mastery.desc: Displays the completion status of all units as a percentage. Clear 3 stages in all units to aim for 100% Mastery (OMEGA Rank).

score.title: Proficiency Score
score.desc: Your mathematical baseline based on initial assessment. Improve this precision by learning each unit.

vis.title: Visualization Mission
vis.desc: Manipulate graphs and figures directly (e.g., vectors, data analysis) to achieve objectives. Emphasizes the link between 'intuition' and 'theory'.

logic.title: Logic Identification
logic.desc: Infer the hidden 'function (rule)' of a black box by observing output changes. Cultivates thinking similar to programming and AI training.

correlation.def: Relationship between two numerical data sets.

diff.def: Momentary rate of change or graph slope.

int.def: Accumulated total or area of small changes.

complex.def: Advanced number capable of describing planar rotation.

omega.name: OMEGA
omega.desc: 100% Mastery. One who has mastered all concepts.

operator.name: OPERATOR
operator.desc: 50%+ Mastery. Can use math as a tool.

overview.headline:
Math is not just
'Studying'.
overview.subheadline:
It is the only language that describes the world,
and the strongest weapon to hack the future.

logic.title: Construction of Logic
logic.desc: Cultivate the ability to find the rules behind phenomena and build logic, rather than just simple calculation.

reality.title: Connection to Reality
reality.desc: Present the use of mathematics in the real world, such as AI development, finance, and physics simulation, not just in textbooks.

tool.title: Professional Tool Perspective
tool.desc: Graduate from learning only to produce 'correct answers' and treat mathematics as a 'tool' to shape your own ideas.

algebraic_logic.title: Algebraic Logic
algebraic_logic.subtitle: Algebraic Logic
algebraic_logic.desc: From positive/negative numbers to equations and factorization. Master the 'literacy' of logic.

functional_dynamics_jh.title: Functional Dynamics
functional_dynamics_jh.subtitle: Functional Dynamics
functional_dynamics_jh.desc: Proportionality, inverse proportionality, linear functions. Learn the basics of describing change with formulas.

geometric_space.title: Geometric Space
geometric_space.subtitle: Geometric Space
geometric_space.desc: Similarity, inscribed angles, Pythagorean theorem. Cultivate the ability to grasp space logically.

data_chance_jh.title: Data & Chance
data_chance_jh.subtitle: Data & Chance
data_chance_jh.desc: Basics of data distribution and probability. The first step to capturing an uncertain world numerically.

quadratics.title: Quadratics
quadratics.subtitle: Mathematics I
quadratics.desc: Design parabolas and derive optimal solutions for parameters.

0.title: Secrets of Quadratics
0.desc: First, control the direction of the graph.

1.title: Decoding the Vertex
1.desc: y = (x - p)^2 + q is the code to find the vertex.
1.why_desc: Match the horizontal position that makes the inside of the parenthesis zero, and the height of the remaining number outside. Overlap the vertex at target (2.0, -1.0).

4.title: Tactical Objective
4.desc: There is always a limit (range) in the world. Mathematical tactics is about aiming for the best result (vertex) within that limited range.

tactics.q1_inst: Factor out coefficient 2 and identify the vertex.
tactics.q2_inst: Beware of sign errors when factoring out negative.
tactics.q3_inst: Fraction involved. Subtract the square of half correctly.

data.title: Data Analysis
data.subtitle: Mathematics I
data.desc: Identify the truth behind data using correlation coefficients (r).

1.name: Signal Generation
1.desc: Generate baseline data. Plot 5+ points to achieve Correlation (r) > 0.90.
1.log_guide: Click to plot points and create a data trend.

2.name: Noise Removal
2.desc: Eliminate noise from data. Remove outliers to improve data precision.
2.log_guide: Click outliers that deviate from the trend to remove them.

3.name: Maximize Precision
3.desc: Aim for high synchronization. Maintain Correlation > 0.99 with 10+ points.
3.log_guide: Plot points densely to approximate a straight line.

concepts.title: 01. Basic Concepts
concepts.correlation_body: An index indicating the relationship between two numerical datasets. For example, if 'Temperature' rises and 'Ice Cream Sales' rise, they have a Positive Correlation. If 'Rainfall' increases and 'Customer Count' decreases, they have a Negative Correlation.
concepts.importance_body: It is essential for predicting the future in the real world. Stock movements, disease progression, cosmic expansion. Everything is controlled by finding patterns in data relationships and predicting the next move.

theory.title: 02. Theoretical Model
theory.r_desc:
Correlation coefficient r ranges from -1 to +1.
Closer to +1 means strong positive correlation, closer to -1 means strong negative correlation, 0 means no relationship.

apps.title: 04. Applications
apps.finance_body: Used in 'Portfolio Theory' to analyze asset relationships and disperse risk. Combining assets with inverse movements reduces damage during crashes.
apps.ai_body: Used to select data strongly related to the prediction target when training AI. Removing irrelevant noise makes AI smarter.
apps.spurious_body: 'Ice cream sales' and 'drowning accidents' are strongly related, but one didn't cause the other (common cause: 'Temperature'). In data analysis, not being fooled by this 'spurious' relationship is key.

completion.msg: Data integrity confirmed. Your analysis result is approved.

probability.title: Probability
probability.subtitle: Mathematics A
probability.desc: Calculate uncertain events and compute future expected values.

1.mission: Move Mean (μ) to 2.0 to shift data center to the right.

2.mission: Decrease Standard Deviation (σ) to reduce data spread.

3.mission: Challenge the Monty Hall Problem and experience counter-intuitive probability.

4.mission: Observe the Law of Large Numbers. Increase trials and see distribution approach theoretical mean.

calculus.title: Calculus
calculus.subtitle: Mathematics II
calculus.desc: Master the moving world using laws of instantaneous change and accumulation.

1.name: Detect Change
1.desc: Capture 'movement'. Manipulate parameters and observe slope > 2.0.
1.log_guide: Move points on graph to create sharp change (slope).

2.name: Identify Vertex
2.desc: Find the moment change stops. Identify the point where slope becomes 0.
2.log_guide: Find the peak/valley (extremum). Change stops momentarily there.

3.name: Calculate Area
3.desc: Accumulate small changes. Achieve area under graph > 10.0.
3.log_guide: Use integration to calculate total amount enclosed by graph.

4.name: Real World App
4.desc: AI training, physics sim, economics. This math is used everywhere.

concepts.title: 01. Basic Concepts
concepts.diff_body: The world is always moving. How it changes 'right now'. That is differentiation. Speedometers differentiate position changes in real-time.

calculus.int_body: 'Accumulation' from the past. Summing up scattered pieces to calculate total distance, area, or energy. CT scans integrate body cross-sections to create 3D models.

theory.title: 02. Theoretical System
theory.derivative_desc:
Derivative f'(x): 'Momentum' or 'Slope' at a point. Captures momentary movement in infinitesimally small time.

Definite Integral ∫ f(x)dx: 'Area' between graph and horizontal axis. Sum of all small changes. Enables 'future prediction' and 'past analysis'.

apps.title: 04. Applications
apps.physics_body: Motion prediction. From falling apples to rocket trajectories, all movement is written in differential equations. Language to decode cosmic laws.
apps.ml_body: 'Learning' mechanism. AI finds the correct answer by descending the slope of its own errors (differentiation).
apps.econ_body: Profit maximization. Calculating 'how profit changes if we sell one more' to pinpoint the most profitable point.

completion.msg: Numeric optimization complete. Change laws mastered.

vectors.title: Vectors
vectors.subtitle: Mathematics C
vectors.desc: Manipulate 'direction' and 'magnitude' to define multi-dimensional space.

3.name: Visualization
3.log_guide: Align two vectors in same direction.

concepts.title: 01. Concept: Arrow Pointing to World
concepts.def_body: Not just a number, but a command: 'Go that way, this strongly'. Force, velocity, wind flow - all world-moving elements are vectors.
concepts.comp_body: Complex diagonal movement can be decomposed into simple 'horizontal' and 'vertical' movements. These are called 'components'.

theory.title: 02. Theory: Spatial Laws
theory.dot_desc: How much two arrows point in the 'same direction'. 0 if perpendicular. Used in game lighting calculations.
theory.cross_desc: Creates a new arrow perpendicular to both. Essential for finding rotational force (torque) or surface direction (normal).

viz.title: 03. Practice: Spatial Grasp
viz.log_guide: Adjust thrusters to maintain spatial balance.

apps.title: 04. Applications: 3D World
apps.cg_body: 3D game visuals are collections of vectors. Polygon direction and light direction determine brightness.
apps.phys_body: Gravity, wind, engine power. Summing all these forces as vectors determines object movement.
apps.nav_body: GPS and flight. Velocity vector combining 'direction' and 'speed' is used.

completion.msg: Vector operation mastered. You can freely manipulate 3D space.

trig.title: Trigonometry
trig.subtitle: Mathematics II
trig.desc: Synchronize circular motion with wave properties and analyze periodicity.

intro.title: Master Famous Angles
intro.desc: Experience the sensation of snapping 'like a magnet' to 30° and 45°.

quiz.success_desc: Burn this position into your brain.

functions.title: Functions & Limits
functions.subtitle: Mathematics III
functions.desc: Master input/output logic and completely decode the black box.

1.name: Sector 1: Translation
1.hint: Signal shifted horizontally by fixed distance.

2.name: Sector 2: Scaling
2.hint: Wave height changing, slight offset occurring.

5.name: Sector 5: Exponential Explosion
5.hint: Growing at uncontrollable speed. Containment required.

sequences.title: Sequences
sequences.subtitle: Mathematics B
sequences.desc: Find continuity in patterns and predict future trends.

modal.success_desc: Sequence trend pattern confirmed. Proceeding to next step.

explanation.title: Explanation: Sequence Properties
explanation.arithmetic_desc: Change by adding fixed number. Draws straight line graph, steady growth.
explanation.geometric_desc: Change by multiplying fixed number. Slow at first, then jumps up rapidly (exponential growth).

matrices.title: Matrices
matrices.subtitle: Mathematics C
matrices.desc: Learn the mechanism of linear transformations that freely distort space.

1.name: 90° Rotation
1.desc: Manipulate matrix to rotate space 90 degrees counter-clockwise.

2.name: 2x Scale
2.desc: Uniformly expand entire space to double size.

complex.title: Complex Plane
complex.subtitle: Mathematics C
complex.desc: Visualize new dimensions using imaginary rotation.

1.name: Imaginary Rotation
1.desc: Multiply real number 1 by i, move result to 'Imaginary Axis (Vertical)'.

2.name: Scale & Rotate
2.desc: Multiply by (1+i) to rotate 45 degrees and expand length.

3.name: Realize via Conjugate
3.desc: Manipulate current complex number to return result to 'Real Axis (Horizontal)'.

quiz.title: Proficiency Test
quiz.subtitle: Assessment
quiz.desc: Measure current understanding and optimize your learning plan.

codex.title: Mathematical Codex
codex.header_desc: Fundamental explanations of mathematical concepts unlocked upon module mastery.

genesis.title: Genesis: The Language of Math
genesis.content: Mathematics is not merely a tool for calculation. It is the sole universal language for describing the mechanics of this world. By understanding the rules behind phenomena, we gain the power to control reality.

quadratics.title: Quadratics: Parabolas & Optimization
quadratics.content: The parabola drawn by a quadratic function exists everywhere in nature. From ball trajectories to satellite dishes. Finding the vertex is the very process of finding the 'optimal solution' in society.

trig.title: Trigonometry: Rhythm & Periodicity
trig.content: Everything in the universe vibrates. Sound, light, heartbeats. The sine wave describes all these periodicities. Learning trigonometry is nothing less than decoding the pulse of the universe.

vectors.title: Vectors: Mastery of Direction & Force
vectors.content: Position is relative, but direction and magnitude are absolute. Mastering vectors allows you to organize and uniquely determine the movement of objects and complex forces in multi-dimensional space.

data.title: Data Analysis: Order in Chaos
data.content: The world is full of informational noise. Correlation coefficients are the compass for extracting meaningful 'truth' from that chaos. Seeing the true connections between data is the first step in prediction.

calculus.title: Calculus: The Science of Change & Accumulation
calculus.content: There is no static moment. Differentiation captures the change 'right now', and integration quantifies the 'accumulation from the past'. Everything in the moving world is described through the lens of calculus.

progress.title: Learning Progress
progress.subtitle: Check mastery status for all modules.

data_analyst.name: Data Analyst
data_analyst.desc: Decoded the signal from the noise.

quiz_ace.name: Quiz Ace
quiz_ace.desc: Achieved a perfect score in the Proficiency Test.
